message:
test(property): add property-based tests for inference and decision engines

Add 13 property-based tests using proptest:

Inference properties (9 tests):
- Posterior validity (sum to 1, valid range)
- Empty evidence equals prior
- Numerical stability for extreme runtimes
- CPU boundary value stability (0%, 100%, epsilon)
- Consistent evidence increases confidence
- Binomial CPU extreme values stability
- Posterior determinism
- High CPU produces valid posteriors
- Orphan+no TTY favors abandoned class

Decision properties (4 tests):
- Expected loss non-negativity and optimal minimizes
- VOI high confidence makes probing less valuable
- VOI outputs finite
- Probe costs non-negative

Also fixes missing Quarantine/Unquarantine match arms in plan/mod.rs.

Closes process_triage-4c8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 7fe28ab74804c60a6c75011c4cbb849ba601cae22d8c25f12cbf97b2c5abdaf8 # shrinks to posterior = ClassScores { useful: 0.25, useful_bad: 0.25, abandoned: 0.25, zombie: 0.25 }
